mapper.insert: insert into sky_take_out.setmeal(category_id, name, price, description, image, create_time,create_user, update_time, update_user,status) VALUES (#{categoryId},#{name},#{price},#{description},#{image},#{createTime},#{createUser}, #{updateTime},#{updateUser},#{status})
mapper.delete:
delete from sky_take_out.setmeal where id in
#{id}
